ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_bodies" (
  "osm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water body */,
  "filter" TEXT /* Type of water body (e.g., water, amenity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the water body */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometric representation of the water body in polygon format */,
  "natural" TEXT /* Natural attribute associated with the water body */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water type */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "quality_index" REAL /* Numeric value representing the water quality */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the water body data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("osm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_bodies_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES water_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_bodies_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_bodies_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the water type (e.g., lentic, lotic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the water type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "osm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the water body associated with the amenity */,
  "amenity_type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., fountain, harbor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the amenity data was last updated */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_osm_id FOREIGN KEY ("osm_id") REFERENCES water_bodies ("osm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometric representation of the region */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator responsible for the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the region data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_regions_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "osm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water body accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the access involved sensitive data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_data_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_data_logs_osm_id FOREIGN KEY ("osm_id") REFERENCES water_bodies ("osm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "osm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the water body or amenity */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata field */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata field */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the metadata is private */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_osm_id FOREIGN KEY ("osm_id") REFERENCES water_bodies ("osm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source information was last updated */,
  "is_trusted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the data source is trusted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the project information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the notification pertains to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "osm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the water body */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter measured (e.g., pH, turbidity) */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_measurements_osm_id FOREIGN KEY ("osm_id") REFERENCES water_bodies ("osm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_measurements_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
